text:
All 360 tests pass, including both new tests:
- `compaction_summary_stats_returns_zeros_when_no_compaction` 
- `compaction_summary_stats_returns_counts_after_compaction`

The function `compaction_summary_stats` is at `rust/crates/runtime/src/compact.rs:144`. It extracts `(count, removed_message_count)` from `session.compaction`, returning `(0, 0)` when no compaction has occurred.
